title: Manage application secrets and configuration for AI solutions
summary: Learn how to manage application secrets and configuration for AI solutions on Azure using Azure Key Vault and Azure App Configuration.

sections.title: Manage application secrets and configuration for AI solutions
sections.summary: Learn how to manage application secrets and configuration for AI solutions on Azure using Azure Key Vault and Azure App Configuration.

lessons.title: Manage application secrets with Azure Key Vault
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure Key Vault to store, retrieve, version, rotate, and cache secrets in AI application code using the Python Azure SDK.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-app-secrets-key-vault/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage application secrets with Azure Key Vault

lessons.title: Manage application settings with Azure App Configuration
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use Azure App Configuration to store, organize, and retrieve application settings and feature flags in AI solutions on Azure, while securely referencing secrets stored in Azure Key Vault.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-app-settings-app-config/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage application settings with Azure App Configuration

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Manage application secrets and configuration for AI solutions
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Manage application secrets and configuration for AI solutions**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
